why.label: Why CivicAI
why.title: AI infrastructure built to last.
why.subtitle: We are not a consulting agency. We are a software publisher — with documented, maintained and scalable products.

pillars.title: Québec infrastructure
pillars.desc: Developed in Trois-Rivières, for Québec and Canadian organizations. Our teams understand the local regulatory framework, public sector realities and the challenges of regional SMEs.

pillars.title: Multi-tenant architecture
pillars.desc: Built to scale — across a chamber, a city, an entire network of organizations. Each client has an isolated, secure and scalable environment without manual intervention.

pillars.title: Measurable AI, not experimental
pillars.desc: Every deployment includes maturity, performance and governance indicators. Artificial intelligence at CivicAI is a documented delivery — not a transformation promise.

vision.label: Our vision
vision.quote: We believe that artificial intelligence must become a concrete tool in service of organizations. Our mission is to create platforms that enable businesses, public institutions and organizations to better understand their data, automate their processes and make better decisions.
vision.author: CivicAI Inc. — Trois-Rivières, Québec

cta.title: Ready to take action?
cta.subtitle: Discuss your challenges with our team. No commitment — a 30-minute conversation is enough to assess the relevance of a deployment.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before reaching out.

items.q: What types of organizations do your platforms serve?
items.a: Our platforms serve chambers of commerce, municipalities, businesses undergoing digital transformation, and public organizations. Any organization dealing with AI governance, SaaS optimization, or community services can benefit from our solutions.
We start with an AI maturity diagnostic. Then we propose a deployment plan tailored to your context. Our platforms are modular and can be deployed progressively, without disrupting your operations.

items.q: Are your platforms compatible with Microsoft 365?
items.a: Yes. NexHire EIP is specifically designed to integrate with the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. AgentHub Platform also includes multi-source connectors compatible with Microsoft environments.
Yes, CivicAI Inc. is based in Trois-Rivières, Québec. Our teams understand the Québec regulatory framework and local market specifics, while operating at the Canadian scale.
Our platforms use a multi-tenant architecture with complete data isolation between clients. Each deployment benefits from secure environments compliant with Québec public sector requirements.

platforms.title: Our platforms
